description: Core: ready()/closeable() predicates reading blockers (best-effort, enforce nothing); front-door flags --parent/--gates/--needs writing the {id,on} edges; epic = task with claim-blocking children (emergent). The default gating plugin binary: claim.pre rejects open claim-blocker, close.pre rejects open close-blocker — the SOLE enforcer.
title: §10 blocker model + gating plugin
